cost_name: Contingency — AACE Class 4 Standard — Alkaline Project — 100 MW — Europe 2025

estimation.estimation_method: AACE Class 4 standard: 15% base contingency. Alkaline: no technology risk increment (TRL 9, fully mature). No precious metal supply risk. 10+ OEMs provide competitive supply security. Total: 15% on direct costs = ~11% of total CAPEX.

confidence.rationale: Alkaline's technology maturity (100+ years, TRL 9, >500 plants globally) justifies lower contingency than PEM. The 15% base is the AACE minimum for Class 4 — no technology-specific increment warranted.

primary_drivers: Alkaline TRL 9: no technology increment (vs PEM +5%)
10+ OEMs: no supply concentration increment (vs PEM +2%)
